title: Connected Dimensions
description: Connects Dimensions at y level -100 and y level 500.
body:
# Connected Dimensions

This mod adds a connection between **The Overworld to The Nether to The End and back to The Overworld**.
For example if a player **goes below** **y level -100 in the Overworld** they **get sent to the exact coordinates in the Nether but at y level 500** instead.
